raw.message: Get fired up for the throwdown! Kiln launches 4/23. Pre-order now to get bonus in-game items!

hook.summary: A high-energy montage of clay-like characters being formed and moving to a rhythmic beat.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a clay blob being shaped, followed by a leopard-print pot and a dancing purple figure.

scene_flow: Fast-paced montage of clay characters being molded and dancing.
Action-packed gameplay snippets showing characters jumping and battling.
A character gets crushed by a giant teapot in a fiery environment.
The title 'KILN' is revealed amidst green flames.
Final end card with pre-order information and platform logos.
audience_proxy: Gamers who enjoy quirky, physics-based party games with a unique, claymation-inspired aesthetic.
